summary: Completed testing of Competition Admin Settings Refactoring. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - 'Show in Navigation' checkbox replaces date field, 'Quiz End Time' is auto-calculated, visibility toggle button works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly implements show_in_nav boolean field with default=True
Backend auto-calculates quiz_end_time from quiz_start_time + duration_minutes
Public API /competitions/active correctly filters by show_in_nav=True
Frontend Create modal shows checkbox with helpful description
Frontend Edit modal shows 'End Time = Start Time + Duration' info box
Expanded competition view shows 'Navigation: Visible/Hidden' status instead of date
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_competition_nav_visibility.py - Created new test file for nav visibility feature

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed competitions during backend testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Competition admin settings refactoring fully tested. Backend uses show_in_nav boolean (default=True) instead of nav_visible_from datetime. quiz_end_time is auto-calculated from quiz_start_time + duration_minutes. Frontend Create/Edit modals show checkbox with description. Expanded view shows 'Navigation: Visible/Hidden' status. Toggle button in action row allows quick visibility changes.

backend_apis.PUT /api/competitions/admin/competitions: Updates show_in_nav, recalculates end_time when duration changes
backend_apis.GET /api/competitions/admin/competitions: Returns all competitions (visible and hidden) for admin

frontend_create_modal.checkbox_description: When checked, competition appears in user sidebar
frontend_create_modal.auto_calc_info: Quiz automatically ends X minutes after start time

frontend_edit_modal.end_time_info: End Time = Start Time + Duration info box

frontend_expanded_view.navigation_status: Shows 'Navigation: Visible' or 'Navigation: Hidden' with icon
frontend_expanded_view.visibility_toggle: Button showing 'Visible' or 'Hidden' to toggle show_in_nav

test_scenarios_covered: Create competition with show_in_nav=true - appears in public API
Create competition with show_in_nav=false - hidden from public API
Create competition without nav_visible_from - works (field removed)
Quiz end time auto-calculated from start + duration
Admin list shows both visible and hidden competitions
Create with minimum required fields (name + quiz_start_time)
